label: Skill value
description: A skill and range pair used in CreepJoinerBenefitDef.skills. Loaded via SkillValue.LoadDataFromXmlCustom: the keyed child element name provides the SkillDef defName (skill field); the element text provides the IntRange (range field). Omitted text resolves to IntRange.Zero (0~0).

skill.label: Skill
skill.description: SkillDef whose level range is set by this entry.

range.label: Range
range.description: IntRange for the skill level, e.g. 14~18. Omitted text in the XML resolves to IntRange.Zero (0~0).
